title: rubus × henrici
intro: Rubus × henrici, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × henrici include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and potential anti-cancer properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × henrici include its ability to support heart health, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant protection, which can help to prevent chronic diseases such as cancer and neurodegenerative disorders. Rubus × henrici can be prepared as a tea, juice, or supplement, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
